title: GalaxyPVP x256
description: Minecraft 1.8.9 pvp resourcepack galaxy theme x256 with new GUI, Special small swords and tools for pvp, purple glassy armor, apples and other items
body:
🌌 Galaxy PVP [256x] | 1.8.9

Galaxy PVP is a high-definition (256x) resource pack designed for Minecraft 1.8.9, bringing a deep-space aesthetic to your combat experience.
✨ Key Features

    Celestial Weaponry: Features highly detailed tools and weapons with nebula-themed textures.

    Stellar Armor: Includes custom skins for all armor types, featuring a glowing "Galactic" look for diamond sets.

    Immersive Skybox: Replaces the standard sky with breathtaking views of colorful distant galaxies and nebulae.

    Themed GUI: A complete overhaul of the inventory and menus with a dark, neon-purple cosmic interface.

    PVP Optimized: High-resolution 256x textures designed specifically to enhance the visual clarity of items and consumables during battle.
